events.appearance_notes: Observed event; A woman in a blue top walked into the room next to the desk lamp and turned off the light.
events.event_text: From 9.2s to 23.4s, a woman in a blue top walked into the room next to the desk lamp and turned off the light.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; The woman in blue clothes took the wheelchair and pushed it to the side of the sofa. Sitting on the sofa was a white-haired woman in pink clothes.
events.event_text: From 26.6s to 40.3s, the woman in blue clothes took the wheelchair and pushed it to the side of the sofa. Sitting on the sofa was a white-haired woman in pink clothes.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; The woman on the sofa wanted to sit up, but the woman standing next to her hit her on the head.
events.event_text: From 40.3s to 44.4s, the woman on the sofa wanted to sit up, but the woman standing next to her hit her on the head.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; The woman next to the sofa hit the person on the sofa on the head and pushed it again. The woman on the sofa moved and then touched her leg.
events.event_text: From 46.4s to 58.7s, the woman next to the sofa hit the person on the sofa on the head and pushed it again. The woman on the sofa moved and then touched her leg.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; The woman in the blue top hit the white-haired woman on the head, then turned the wheelchair to her side and walked to the back.
events.event_text: From 58.7s to 69.1s, the woman in the blue top hit the white-haired woman on the head, then turned the wheelchair to her side and walked to the back.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; The white-haired woman on the sofa stood up with her wheelchair, then pushed the wheelchair towards the door, while the woman in blue top walked beside her.
events.event_text: From 70.1s to 85.8s, the white-haired woman on the sofa stood up with her wheelchair, then pushed the wheelchair towards the door, while the woman in blue top walked beside her.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; The woman in blue slapped the white-haired woman on the first two slaps, then followed her out and hit her again after going out.
events.event_text: From 84.8s to 103.3s, the woman in blue slapped the white-haired woman on the first two slaps, then followed her out and hit her again after going out.
